privileged_info_summary: The task data is based on real CAMEO software (NOAA/EPA tool for EPCRA Tier II management). Two Vermont facilities are documented: Northfield Paper Mill (paper mill, bleaching operations) and Essex Wire and Cable (wire/cable manufacturing, refrigeration and etching). The XML source file contains three chemicals stored above announced thresholds: Chlorine Dioxide (40 lbs on site, claimed TPQ 10 lbs), Ammonia Anhydrous (800 lbs on site, confirmed EPA TPQ 500 lbs), and Hydrofluoric Acid (200 lbs on site, confirmed EPA TPQ 100 lbs). All three are currently marked EHS=false. Ammonia and Hydrofluoric Acid are confirmed EPA EHS substances under 40 CFR 355. Chlorine Dioxide is NOT on the EPA EHS list but IS regulated under OSHA PSM with a 1000-pound threshold, not 10 pounds.
